rows.label: tev020601_JNK0010
rows.name: Inquire

rows.label: tev020601_SEL0011
rows.name:
Ask Victoria about the
commercial district.

rows.label: tev020601_JNK0020
rows.name: Discuss

rows.label: tev020601_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask Victoria about recent developments.

rows.label: tev020601_SEL0031
rows.name:
Ask Victoria if anything
is troubling her.

rows.label: tev020601_SEL1011
rows.name: Ask Victoria about Belle Betty Fashions.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020601_SEL1021
rows.name: Ask Victoria about recent developments.

rows.label: tev020601_SEL1031
rows.name: Ask Victoria about Belle Betty Fashions.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020601_SEL2021
rows.name: Ask Victoria about recent developments.

rows.label: tev020601_MSG0001
rows.name:
There are all sorts of fun shops
in this district. Cafés...
Pizzerias... Clothing boutiques...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020601_MSG0002
rows.name:
Doesn't coming here make you
forget that you're on some
distant planet and not Earth?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020601_MSG0003
rows.name:
Of course, that's precisely why this place exists.
We're not strong enough to handle living away from
Earth while walled inside an unfamiliar world.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020601_MSG0004
rows.name:
This district was designed to provide some
of the comforts of Earth and help relieve
the stress of our current situation.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020601_MSG0005
rows.name:
You should make sure to come by and blow off
some steam from time to time, all right? Don't
just pursue one crazy mission after another![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020601_MSG0008
rows.name:
The shop where I work is called
"Belle Betty Fashions."[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020601_MSG0009
rows.name:
We're NLA's hottest fashion brand,
releasing all of the latest fashions
for discerning women of taste.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020601_MSG0010
rows.name:
Oh, I know there are some who say that humanity
is engaged in a fight for survival, and that this
is no time to be worrying about appearances.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020601_MSG0011
rows.name:
But I say that's all the more reason to enjoy looking
your best! If you feel good about yourself today,
you'll have the courage to fight for tomorrow.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020601_MSG0016
rows.name:
Belle Betty Fashions would love to start
dealing in clothes for Ma-non women.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020601_MSG0017
rows.name:
But their fashion sense is so...unique.
Clothes from human designers don't
seem to appeal to them very much.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020601_MSG0018
rows.name:
We've been trying to find a good Ma-non
designer, but we haven't had much luck.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020601_MSG0019
rows.name:
I know that there has to be a Ma-non with a great
aesthetic sense out there somewhere. A fashion-forward
genius who can really capture their imagination![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020601_MSG1001
rows.name:
We're fortunate to have so many
xenoform customers in our shop lately.
It's really been boosting sales.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020601_MSG1002
rows.name:
But the other day, we had a
disturbing encounter with a BLADE
operative who came into the shop.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020601_MSG1003
rows.name:
He started screaming and frothing at the mouth,
claiming we were traitors for fawning over the Ma-non.
Then he demanded that our shop be closed at once![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020601_MSG1004
rows.name:
Naturally, our customers were
terrified, and we immediately
sent a complaint to BLADE HQ.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020601_MSG1005
rows.name:
Don't get me wrong—we're grateful for all
that BLADE has done for us. But that one
with the crazy ideas is nothing but trouble.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020601_MSG1010
rows.name:
Mmm... This fragrance is wild!
Something about it just sends
a shiver down my spine.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020601_MSG1011
rows.name:
I bet it will be a big hit
with the ladies of BLADE.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020601_MSG1012
rows.name:
We're going to start working with
Panyal to develop products that
excite non-Ma-non women as well.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020601_MSG1013
rows.name:
I hope you'll be looking forward
to Belle Betty Fashions' new
worldwide product line![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020601_MSG1020
rows.name:
A BLADE operative named Alex had been coming
into the store and causing scenes, ranting about
how we're traitors for serving the Ma-non.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020601_MSG1021
rows.name:
He scared off a lot of our regular customers,
and impacted sales more than a little bit.
But it seems all of that is finally over![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020601_MSG1022
rows.name:
We heard from BLADE what happened to
Alex. And though it sounds cruel to
say, I fear the man had it coming.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020601_MSG1023
rows.name:
There have been simpleminded people
waving the banner of prejudice in
every era of human history.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020601_MSG1024
rows.name:
But this experience has really made
me wonder if there isn't something
we could do to change their minds.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020601_MSG2001
rows.name: Mmm... This fragrance is so calming.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020601_MSG2002
rows.name:
I'm sure everyone's had difficulty
relaxing since we arrived here on Mira.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020601_MSG2003
rows.name:
A fragrance like this could
be a big seller for us![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020601_MSG2004
rows.name:
We're going to start working with
Panyal to develop products that
appeal to non-Ma-non women as well.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020601_MSG2005
rows.name:
I hope you'll be looking forward
to Belle Betty Fashions' new
worldwide product line![ST:wait ]
